visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses, wearing a pink t-shirt with a green logo and a grey newsboy cap, stands in an indoor room. He holds a blue iPhone facing the camera, smiling and talking enthusiastically. The background includes a TV on the wall and a desk with a coffee machine. (2) The camera zooms in on the blue iPhone screen, showing the iOS home screen with various app icons. The man's thumb is visible interacting with the screen to open Safari. (3) A screen recording shows a webpage for a concert. The man takes a screenshot, and the screen displays the screenshot editor. At the bottom, he highlights an 'Add to Calendar' button which automatically populates an event. (4) The man returns to the frame, holding the phone and gesturing with his right hand as he explains the next feature. He maintains eye contact with the camera. (5) A screenshot of a food photo (grilled meat) is shown. He demonstrates clicking a search icon which brings up a 'Results from Google' panel with similar images and restaurant info. (6) The man demonstrates the final feature by pointing the phone's camera at a coffee machine in the background. The screen displays a 'ChatGPT' prompt box where he asks what the object is, and a detailed English text response appears on the screen. (7) The man concludes by pointing at the camera and smiling, with the phone still in his hand.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Subtitle]: 更新iOS18視覺智慧的. (2) [Subtitle]: 三種用法. (3) [Subtitle]: 第一種 如果呢. (4) [Subtitle]: 你現在看到的網頁. (5) [Subtitle]: 上面有時間地點的. (6) [Subtitle]: 你這個時候只要按一下截圖. (7) [Subtitle]: 這個時候你點開你的截圖以後呢. (8) [Subtitle]: 往下面看. (9) [Subtitle]: 下面就有一個Add to Calender. (10) [Subtitle]: 就是加到你的行事曆. (11) [Subtitle]: 這個時候你點下去. (12) [Subtitle]: 你看它就會出現. (13) [Subtitle]: 你是不是要把baby monster. (14) [Subtitle]: 然後時間什麼時候你可以. (15) [Subtitle]: Create一個event. (16) [Subtitle]: 它就可以直接把你加進去. (17) [Subtitle]: 你的行事曆裡面了. (18) [Subtitle]: 是不是很簡單. (19) [Subtitle]: 你以為截圖就這樣嗎. (20) [Subtitle]: 還有第二種用法. (21) [Subtitle]: 第二種用法 看到社群. (22) [Subtitle]: 或者是網頁有喜歡的吃的. (23) [Subtitle]: 或者是人家的包包. (24) [Subtitle]: 像我看到吃的. (25) [Subtitle]: 這個時候呢 一樣按一下截圖. (26) [Subtitle]: 這個時候截圖呢 點下去. (27) [Subtitle]: 點出你的截圖呢. (28) [Subtitle]: Image Search. (29) [Subtitle]: 就搜索. (30) [Subtitle]: 你這個時候就可以看到. (31) [Subtitle]: 就是相關的搜索出來的照片. (32) [Subtitle]: 你就可以找到你想要的. (33) [Subtitle]: 甚至一個你要買的東西哦. (34) [Subtitle]: 最後一個開啟視覺智慧. (35) [Subtitle]: 這個時候有一個Ask按下去. (36) [Subtitle]: 你就可以直接問它. (37) [Subtitle]: 你就問ChatGPT. (38) [Subtitle]: 請問前面那一台咖啡機. (39) [Subtitle]: 是什麼東西呢. (40) [Subtitle]: 你看它就顯示出來啦. (41) [Subtitle]: iOS18很多新功能. (42) [Subtitle]: 繼續拍給你們.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting tech features.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged male with short hair, wearing glasses, a grey patterned flat cap, and a pink 'Roots' brand t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor room with soft lighting. A black flat-screen TV is mounted on a light-colored wall. A wooden desk area features a coffee machine and some tea-making supplies.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male speaker with a high-energy, friendly tone begins a tech tutorial. The background music is an upbeat, electronic track with a steady drum beat. The audio is crisp with no noticeable environmental noise. (2) A 'pop' sound effect triggers as he demonstrates the screenshot gesture. The speaker maintains a fast, enthusiastic pace. (3) A subtle digital 'ding' sounds when the calendar event is successfully created on screen. (4) The music continues steadily as the speaker introduces the second feature. (5) Another UI sound effect plays when the image search is activated. The speaker's articulation is very clear. (6) A soft synth whoosh transition plays as the camera shifts perspective to show the coffee machine. (7) The final phase ends with the speaker's vocal tone rising in excitement, followed by the music and voice cutting out cleanly.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Intro -> Feature Demonstration 1 -> Feature Demonstration 2 -> Feature Demonstration 3 -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To educate iPhone users about three innovative Visual Intelligence features introduced in iOS 18, demonstrating practical utilities such as instant calendar scheduling, reverse image searching for products/food, and AI-powered object identification via ChatGPT integration.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Reviewer enthusiastically demonstrates new features of the iPhone's latest operating system.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-density information layout typical of short-form social media tutorials, combining clear speech with screen-captured evidence to build high trust and utility.
